zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Swynnerton於大約1153年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾惠特莫爾時，她的父親Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton29歲，母親Margery de Aldithley17歲。她於大約1170年與John de Botreaux在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾惠特莫爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1189年在她的家鄉享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Swynnerton was born about 1153, in Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, was 29 and her mother, Margery de Aldithley, was 17. She married John de Botreaux about 1170, in Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1189, in her hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Swynnerton est née environ 1153, à Whitmore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery de Aldithley, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John de Botreaux environ 1170, à Whitmore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1189, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Swynnerton um 1153 in Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton 29 und ihre Mutter Margery de Aldithley 17. Sie hat um 1170 in Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom John de Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1189 im Alter von 38 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Swynnerton è nata il circa 1153 nel Whitmore, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margery de Aldithley, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John de Botreaux circa 1170, nel Whitmore, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1189, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Swynnertonが約1153年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィトモーで生まれた時，父Robert FitzAlan of Swynnertonは29歳，母Margery de Aldithleyは17歳であった。約1170年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィトモーでJohn de Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1189年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Swynnerton(이)가 대략 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 휘트모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Aldithley(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 휘트모어에서 John de Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 그녀의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Swynnerton родилась около 1153 г. в местности уитмор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Aldithley, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Botreaux около 1170 г. в местности уитмор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1189 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.
